title: The Ultimate Solopreneur Agent Harness for AI Builders (Claude Code Harness)
summary: Ron Demerit's "Solopreneur Rig" is a Claude Code harness featuring 16 specialized sub-agents, a product manager orchestrator, and session locking for client isolation. The harness enables dynamic routing across Opus, Sonnet, and Haiku models, context engineering, and token efficiency for building applications like music learning tools, local transcription, and self-hosted hosting platforms.
